objects.name: Atlassian security advisory (AV26-375)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-375 Date: April 21, 2026 On April 21, 2026, Atlassian published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities, including some critical ones, in the following products: Bamboo Data Center and Server – multiple versions Bitbucket Data Center and Server – multiple versions Confluence Data Center and Server – multiple versions Jira Data Center and Server – multiple versions Jira Service Management Data Center and Server – multiple versions The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided...
